name: DevOps Automation Workflow
description: CI/CD and infrastructure automation workflow covering code analysis, container builds, deployment orchestration, and incident alerting.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Git Push Trigger
nodes.description: Listens for push or pull-request events on configured branches via webhook.

nodes.label: Code Analysis Agent
nodes.description: Runs static analysis, security scanning, and test coverage checks.

nodes.label: Container Build & Push
nodes.description: Builds Docker image, tags with commit SHA, and pushes to container registry.

nodes.label: Deploy Orchestrator
nodes.description: Executes rolling deployment to target environment with health-check gating.

nodes.label: Incident Alerting
nodes.description: Sends deployment status and any failure details to Slack and PagerDuty.
